name: El Rais
description: The rice dishes of Maó harbour: arroz del senyoret, black rice and seasonal rices, alongside raw-bar dishes and cooking over embers and a wood-fired oven, on the front line of the Moll de Llevant. This is the seafaring house of the Ses Forquilles group —chef-owners Marco Antonio Collado and Oriol Castel, with sommelier Raquel Yagüe— reading the Menorcan repertoire in a contemporary key. Michelin Guide recommended in 2025 and 2026, and listed in the Repsol Guide.

practicalInfo.acceso: Moll de Llevant 314, Maó harbour (above the Club Marítimo).
practicalInfo.horario: Indicative: Tuesday to Sunday, 1.00–3.15 pm and 7.30–10.45 pm; closed Mondays. Seasonal hours: confirm before going.

seo.description: El Rais (Maó harbour): rice dishes and seafaring cooking by the Ses Forquilles group on the Moll de Llevant, Michelin Guide recommended in 2026.
